caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt and a matching green baseball cap sits in a studio setting, speaking into a professional black microphone. His shirt features the bold white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK." He wears black over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a wall decorated with framed photographs. In the background, a white mannequin torso is visible alongside clothing racks and various apparel. Small logos appear in the bottom corners of the scene, including one that reads "BOOGIE FELIX TOT." As the sequence progresses, the man's facial expression shifts from a focused, speaking demeanor to a wide, joyful smile with his mouth open, indicating he is laughing or reacting to something. His head tilts slightly and his gaze shifts, while the background elements and his attire remain constant throughout the clip.
